hooks.command: for interpreter in python3 python py; do "$interpreter" -V >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec env PYTHONUTF8=1 "$interpreter" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/sensitive_data_guard.py"; done; echo 'ai-guardrail-kit: 找不到 Python 3.9+。' >&2; exit 127

for interpreter in python3 python py; do "$interpreter" -V >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec env PYTHONUTF8=1 "$interpreter" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/block_pii_prompt.py"; done; echo 'ai-guardrail-kit: 找不到 Python 3.9+。' >&2; exit 127
